sections.text:
## Status
Accepted

## Context
The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. GitHub private repo docs are leaking into public search because the access_type wasn't set at ingest.

## Decision
Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count. Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries.

## Consequences
Permission sync for Confluence is 4 hours behind because the cursor-based pagination hit a rate limit.
